title: Dox
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Dox.jpg]] |name=Dox |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[Merson]]{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Die well.''"
"''Copy that.|[[Ronhar Kim]] and Dox|[[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]]}} '''Dox''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Dox was assigned to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ronhar Kim]]. ==Biography== Dox was sent along with a number of clones to [[Merson]], under the command of Ronhar Kim and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Tap-Nar-Pal]]. They were sent to battle the Merson [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], who had allied themselves with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], fearing Kim's plans to test the entire [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|Midi-chlorians]], set the battle as a trap to eliminate Kim and Pal. During the [[Battle of Merson|battle]], the Republic forces found themselves outnumbered by a "factor of five", with CIS droid forces and supplies having unexpectedly reinforced the pirates. Both in orbit and planetside, the Jedi and clones found themselves beset. At some point during the battle, Dox suffered a wound, which had cracked his helmet and left a deep cut across his face. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] almost immediately pulled back his naval forces, leaving those planetside vulnerable and stranded. Tap-Nar-Pal refused to retreat and leave his master, and attempted to strafe the droid forces attacking Kim and Dox, but was shot down and killed. Kim and Dox had found cover, and witnessed Pal's death. Kim, realizing the battle was lost, fell quiet. Dox asked Kim for his orders, sarcastically pointing out that surrender was not an option. Kim told him to die well, to which Dox agreed. He then led his nine surviving men into battle, attempting to destroy as many [[Droid/Legends|droids]] as they could. Soon, General Kim, the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] troopers, and Dox all fell, cut down by blasterfire. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Battle for the Republic]]'' *[[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dox |pl=Dox }} [[Category:Clone trooper commanders]] [[Category:Males]]
